Appearances:
Plaintiff, Bay Area Properties, Ltd is represented by David Kaplan.
Attorney, Robert Lee Smithton, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Brandon Nash, is present.
Attorney, Jessica Alexandra, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
